description_long: This object depicts a small residential neighborhood block featuring several modern-style houses arranged around a central landscaped area. The houses are rectangular with flat roofs, large windows, and clean lines, typical of contemporary architecture. The block is bordered by a paved road, and each house has its own driveway, some with visible garages. The landscaping includes trees, shrubs, and small garden spaces, adding greenery and separation between the homes. The materials appear to be a mix of concrete, glass, and wood, with neutral tones dominating the color palette. The overall layout suggests a planned suburban development with a focus on privacy and outdoor space.
description: A modern residential block with several flat-roofed houses, large windows, and landscaped gardens, bordered by a paved road.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main road, driveways, and the facades of the houses with visible landscaping.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side of the block, the arrangement of houses, and more of the garden areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, rear facades, and additional landscaping details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garages, side entrances, and the continuation of the road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small overhangs or porches, and direct access from driveways.
